title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
The moderation team has completed a full triage of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2):**
- spam_wave_42 — Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2):**
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for suspicious automation behavior; asked to review the community bot policy.
- new_member_17 — Reminded of formatting guidelines.

**Dismissed / No Action (2):**
- report_003 (trusted_helper) — Medium-severity dispute; reviewed and closed with no sanction.
- report_006 (core_maintainer) — Confirmed false positive resulting from a coordinated mass-report brigade following a legitimate moderation decision; closed with no action.

All 6 reports have been resolved. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you have concerns, please use the official report channels.
